action_text: Click the "Show / hide filter" funnel button to open the filter builder
rationale: We need to create a list filter; opening the filter builder is a direct way to add a "Short description contains ..." condition.

action_text: Open the "Search a specific field" dropdown
rationale: Using the quick field search is faster; first switch the field from Number to Short description.

action_text: Select "Short description" as the search field
rationale: Selecting the Short description field enables us to search that column for the series token.

action_text: Type "#SERIES-f9d328e8-a" into the list search box
rationale: After selecting the correct field, enter the target token to filter the list to matching entries.

action_text: Toggle the column search row for per-column filtering
rationale: As an alternative approach, enable the per-column search row to filter the Short description column directly.
